youtube.name: YouTube
youtube.description: Rich video presence — title, channel, artwork, progress, playlists, live streams, and browsing
youtube.author: Syncr Contributors

settings.label: Show artwork
settings.description: Display a large image on Discord (thumbnail, channel avatar, or YouTube logo)

settings.label: Artwork source
settings.description: Which image to use when watching a video

settings.label: Thumbnail quality
settings.description: Resolution of the video thumbnail sent to Discord

settings.label: Show playback progress
settings.description: Show elapsed time on Discord (not shown for live streams)

settings.label: Show play/pause icon
settings.description: Small status icon for playing, paused, or live

settings.label: Hide when paused
settings.description: Clear Discord presence while the video is paused

settings.label: Title-first layout
settings.description: Show video title as the primary line and channel as the secondary line

settings.label: Show playlist name
settings.description: Include the current playlist in the status line when watching from a playlist

settings.label: Show chapter name
settings.description: Include the active video chapter when available

settings.label: Show view count
settings.description: Append view count to the status line

settings.label: Show video button
settings.description: Add a link button to the video or stream

settings.label: Show channel button
settings.description: Add a "View Channel" button on Discord

settings.label: Share browsing activity
settings.description: Show presence when browsing YouTube outside of a watch page

settings.label: Detailed browsing labels
settings.description: Show specific pages like Home, Search, Subscriptions instead of generic "Browsing"

youtube-music.name: YouTube Music
youtube-music.description: Shows song title, artist, album art, album name, and playback progress
youtube-music.author: Syncr Contributors

settings.label: Show artwork
settings.description: Display album art on Discord (or the YouTube Music logo)

settings.label: Artwork source
settings.description: Which image to use while a track is playing

settings.label: Show playback progress
settings.description: Show elapsed time on Discord

settings.label: Show play/pause icon
settings.description: Small status icon for playing or paused

settings.label: Hide when paused
settings.description: Clear Discord presence while playback is paused

settings.label: Song-first layout
settings.description: Show the song title as the primary line and artist as the secondary line

settings.label: Show album name
settings.description: Include the album or single name in the status line

settings.label: Rich listening metadata
settings.description: Send album, artist, and artwork metadata to Discord's listening UI

settings.label: Show listen button
settings.description: Add a "Listen on YouTube Music" button on Discord

settings.label: Share browsing activity
settings.description: Show presence when browsing YouTube Music without a track playing

settings.label: Detailed browsing label
settings.description: Show "Browsing YouTube Music" instead of a generic browsing message

reddit.name: Reddit
reddit.description: Shows post title, subreddit, author, score, comment count, and thumbnail
reddit.author: Syncr Contributors

netflix.name: Netflix
netflix.description: Shows title, season and episode, synopsis, thumbnail, and playback progress
netflix.author: Syncr Contributors

proton-mail.name: Proton Mail
proton-mail.description: Shows composing, reading, or browsing inbox — not subjects or senders
proton-mail.author: Syncr Contributors

spotify.name: Spotify
spotify.description: Shows track, artist, and album when listening, plus playlist and podcast modes
spotify.author: Syncr Contributors

twitch.name: Twitch
twitch.description: Shows stream, VOD, or clip title, channel, game, thumbnail, and playback progress
twitch.author: Syncr Contributors
